name: list_commitments
description: Lists Compute Engine Commitments in a region. Details for each commitment include name, ID, status, plan, type, resources, and creation, start and end timestamps. Requires project and region as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing region commitments.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of commitments to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list commitments.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

region.description: Required. The region of the commitments.
